perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with a close-up of a man (Tim哥) in a white t-shirt, glasses, and a flat cap, speaking enthusiastically against a red Nintendo-branded backdrop. (2) The scene transitions to shots of a large exhibition hall with red partitions and signage for 'Switch 2 體驗會 Taipei'. (3) The camera shows a venue map on a board, with a hand pointing to specific zones like Mario Kart and Donkey Kong. (4) Footage displays various game trial areas with rows of monitors and players, followed by close-ups of large TV screens running Donkey Kong and Kirby games. (5) The camera captures product packaging for the console and bundles in a display case, along with price lists and peripheral accessories like steering wheels and cameras. (6) The video concludes with the man holding up a red promotional towel with the Switch 2 logo.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Energetic, upbeat electronic background music starts immediately alongside a male voice speaking in a friendly, high-pitched, and excited tone. (2) As the visuals shift to the venue, the sound of a bustling crowd and ambient hall reverb becomes slightly audible beneath the narration and music. (3) Sound effects (SFX) like 'ding' or 'pop' sounds are synchronized with the appearance of key text overlays. (4) The music and high-density narration continue steadily through the product showcase and pricing details, maintaining a consistent energy until the final sign-off.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional subtitles provide a verbatim transcription of the spoken Mandarin narration. (2) Decorative/Hook Text: 'Switch 2 體驗會 Taipei' (Event title), '7月10號' (Release date), '必買遊戲之一!' (One of the must-buy games!), '有十款!!' (There are ten!!), '送限量毛巾!' (Free limited towel!). (3) Pricing details: '15580元' and '14380元' appear on screen when discussing the different console bundles.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro -> Venue Tour -> Game Highlights -> Pricing/Bundles -> Outro/Perks

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main creator (Tim哥), approximately 4 staff members in red shirts, and 3 visitors visible in the background.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: An adult male tech influencer wearing a white 'HUMAN MADE' t-shirt, green-rimmed glasses, and a grey plaid flat cap.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A large indoor venue (Taipei Expo Park) decorated with extensive red Nintendo branding, banners, game demo stations with monitors, and glass display cases for products.
visual_scene_and_style.lightingStyle: Bright studio/exhibition lighting, uniform and clear.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Venue Overview -> Game Portfolio -> Product Pricing -> CTA/Perks
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video serves as a promotional news report to inform Nintendo fans in Taiwan about an upcoming Switch 2 experience event. It highlights key game titles, release dates, and purchasing options to generate hype and encourage attendance at the physical venue.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Direct recommendation of games as 'must-buys' and detailed presentation of price points and event logistics.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: The creator's energetic 'Tim哥' persona, specific hat/glasses aesthetic, and use of fast-paced variety-show style editing.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video successfully blends personal vlog style with professional product news, making the information feel accessible yet authoritative.
